# ACE Coach — Tennis & Padel Coaching Platform

> ACE Coach is the all-in-one platform connecting tennis and padel players with verified coaches.
> Players discover coaches, book sessions, follow structured training programs, track progress with
> health-data integration, and join a global community. Coaches manage bookings, sell packages,
> publish events, and grow their professional brand. Clubs centralize coaches, courts, members,
> bookings, and a built-in CRM.

## Core links
- [Home](https://ace-whisperer-guide.lovable.app/)
- [Find a Coach](https://ace-whisperer-guide.lovable.app/find-a-coach)
- [Marketplace (Training Programs)](https://ace-whisperer-guide.lovable.app/marketplace)
- [Events](https://ace-whisperer-guide.lovable.app/events)
- [Community & Rankings](https://ace-whisperer-guide.lovable.app/community)
- [Sign up / Log in](https://ace-whisperer-guide.lovable.app/login)

## What ACE Coach offers
- **Players**: search coaches by sport, city, language, price; instant booking; structured weekly
  training plans; progress dashboards; health & recovery integration (Whoop, Oura, Polar, Garmin);
  XP, streaks, leaderboards, rewards wallet, referral program.
- **Coaches**: profile + portfolio, package & event creation, calendar + availability management,
  CRM for leads and clients, training-program marketplace, earnings dashboard.
- **Clubs**: branded public club page, coach roster, court management, bookings overview,
  member CRM, follower & event distribution.

## Sports covered
Tennis, Padel.

## Geography
Global platform, primary launch markets: Spain, Portugal, Italy, France, Germany, UK, USA, UAE.

## Contact
hello@ace-whisperer-guide.lovable.app
